leads.name: JS INTERNATIONAL
leads.why_good: JS INTERNATIONAL is a supplier offering authentic Korean cosmetic brands, indicating a strong presence in the industry.
leads.estimated_value: High due to established experience in trading cosmetics.
leads.how_to_approach: Visit their website to understand their product range and contact them through their provided channels.
leads.best_message: Hello JS INTERNATIONAL, we are interested in exploring your range of authentic Korean cosmetic brands for potential distribution in our region.

leads.name: Q-Depot
leads.why_good: Q-Depot is a highly rated Korean cosmetics wholesale supplier with strong presence across multiple platforms, indicating reliability and trustworthiness.
leads.estimated_value: High due to strong ratings and presence.
leads.how_to_approach: Visit their website to explore partnership opportunities and contact them through their provided channels.
leads.best_message: Hello Q-Depot team, I am impressed by your high ratings across various platforms and am interested in exploring a potential partnership for skincare distribution.

leads.name: UMMA
leads.why_good: UMMA is a prominent distributor of trending Korean beauty and skincare products, making them a relevant and reliable partner.
leads.current_focus: Wholesale distribution of Korean beauty and skincare products.
leads.estimated_value: High due to their focus on trending products.
leads.how_to_approach: Explore their website for product offerings and reach out through their contact form for potential collaboration.
leads.best_message: Hi UMMA team, your focus on trending Korean beauty products aligns with our interests, and we would love to discuss potential distribution opportunities.

leads.name: Cosibella
leads.why_good: Cosibella is a wholesale distributor specializing in Korean cosmetics, offering a wide range of skincare and makeup products.
leads.current_focus: Distributing innovative Korean skincare and makeup products.
leads.estimated_value: High due to their focus on innovative products.
leads.how_to_approach: Explore their website for product offerings and reach out via their contact form for partnership opportunities.
leads.best_message: Dear Cosibella, we are keen to partner with a distributor like you to bring innovative Korean skincare products to our market.

leads.name: KCOSW
leads.why_good: KCOSW has been supplying Korean cosmetics since 2013, offering flexible ordering methods and AI-powered support.
leads.current_focus: Supplying Korean cosmetics with flexible ordering and support.
leads.estimated_value: High due to their long-standing presence and support services.
leads.how_to_approach: Sign up on their website to access their services and inquire about partnership opportunities.
leads.best_message: Dear KCOSW, we are impressed by your flexible ordering options and would like to discuss potential collaboration.
